repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'gps_pos'.: gps_pos is a port of the component type thr_mgmt, but pspg.gps_pos is a subcomponent port not visible in the component type annex -> Remove the entire assume clause 'gps_pos = pspg.gps_pos' because pspg is not visible in thr_mgmt type scope
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to 'pspg'.: pspg is a subcomponent of thr_mgmt.i, not visible in thr_mgmt component type annex -> Remove the entire assume clause 'pspg.speed = speed' because pspg is not visible in thr_mgmt type scope

line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'gps_pos'.: gps_pos is a port in thread type, not visible in implementation annex scope -> Remove gps_pos reference from assume statement
line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'pspg'.: pspg is a subcomponent, not visible in assume scope -> Remove pspg reference from assume statement
line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to 'pspg'.: pspg is a subcomponent, not visible in assume scope -> Remove pspg reference from assume statement
line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to 'speed'.: speed is a port in thread type, not visible in implementation annex scope -> Remove speed reference from assume statement

line 107: Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations: AGREE assignments in thread type annex -> Move the annex block from thr_mgmt to thr_mgmt.i
line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to '"signal_routing_gps_pos": gps_pos': Reference to port 'gps_pos' in thread type context -> Move the annex block from thr_mgmt to thr_mgmt.i
line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'gps_pos': Reference to port 'gps_pos' in thread type context -> Move the annex block from thr_mgmt to thr_mgmt.i
line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to 'pspg': Reference to subcomponent 'pspg' in thread type context -> Move the annex block from thr_mgmt to thr_mgmt.i
line 107: mismatched input '"signal_routing_gps_pos"' expecting RULE_ID: Invalid AGREE syntax in thread type annex -> Move the annex block from thr_mgmt to thr_mgmt.i

line 118: Couldn't resolve reference to 'gps_pos'.: AGREE cannot resolve 'gps_pos' as it's not declared in the implementation scope -> Remove the assignment 'assign "signal_routing_gps_pos": gps_pos = pspg.gps_pos;' from the AGREE annex
line 119: LHS of assignment must be an AGREE 'eq' variable or an output port of this component: AGREE cannot assign to 'pspg.speed' as it's a subcomponent port, not an output port of this component -> Remove the assignment 'assign "signal_routing_speed": pspg.speed = speed;' from the AGREE annex
line 120: LHS of assignment must be an AGREE 'eq' variable or an output port of this component: AGREE cannot assign to 'pspg.angle' as it's a subcomponent port, not an output port of this component -> Remove the assignment 'assign "signal_routing_angle": pspg.angle = angle;' from the AGREE annex

line 118: Couldn't resolve reference to '"signal_routing_gps_pos": gps_pos'.: AGREE assignment LHS references component port 'gps_pos' as if it were an output port -> Change 'gps_pos = pspg.gps_pos' to 'pspg.gps_pos = gps_pos' to match the correct data flow direction
line 119: LHS of assignment must be an AGREE 'eq' variable or an output port of this component: AGREE assignment LHS references subcomponent port 'pspg.speed' as if it were an output port of this component -> Change 'pspg.speed = speed' to 'speed = pspg.speed' to match the correct data flow direction
line 120: LHS of assignment must be an AGREE 'eq' variable or an output port of this component: AGREE assignment LHS references subcomponent port 'pspg.angle' as if it were an output port of this component -> Change 'pspg.angle = angle' to 'angle = pspg.angle' to match the correct data flow direction
